title: ProbablyAri's Modpack
description: The optimized and beautiful modpack that I personally made for myself
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8af51961bd6f4d92375d7337c6ebcc5856c7fd3d.png) Oh hey there 👋. I guess I should tell you about this modpack. # About ![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bddebb5d5ab964a76e13c2cf9d223a69e7390912.png) Many players love creating custom modpacks tailored to their unique playstyle, and this one is no exception! This modpack brings together all the essential mods I use in my daily gameplay. And I decided to share it for those that want to experience something new. This modpack doesnt go away from the vanilla aspect of the game. It only consists of QoL ( Quality of Life ) mods and quite a bit of optimization mods. Since I am using MacOS it has a couple of mods that improve the general playablity of the game on MacOS. But I am sure that the modpack will work perfectly fine on a windows device. Heck it should even work for the folks that use Linux! ![Yes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5f0f7932d5c4aed2895fbf8fa8417821ad72d45_0.webp) # Included Mods ![Included Mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ee9d5c505f540d77de774cf02150d7f935a5e71.png) There are about 50ish mods.
Mods ( And Resource Packs ) [libIPN](https://modrinth.com/mod/libipn/version/fabric-1.21-6.0.3) [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin/version/3.0.5+mc1.21) [Smooth Scrolling](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scroll/version/2.1.3) [Hold That Chunk](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-that-chunk/version/2.1.0) [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/version/1.2.2+1.21) [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity/version/3.0.0-beta.5+1.21) [Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop/version/0.3.0-fabric) [Bad Packets](https://modrinth.com/mod/badpackets/version/fabric-0.8.1) [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks/version/1.21-2.26-fabric) [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential/version/1.3.4.3) [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes/version/0.3.0+1.21.1) [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/version/mc1.21-0.6.0-beta.2-fabric) ( **ofc** ) [Shulker Box Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip/version/5.1.1+1.21.1-fabric) [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next/version/fabric-1.21.1-2.0.7) [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures/version/6vli6rDE) [Smooth Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-skies/version/2.0.4) [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config/version/15.0.140+fabric) [Lamb Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights/version/3.1.1+1.21.1) [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api/version/2.4.1+1.21) [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads/version/0.13.4) [Fast Quit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit/version/3.0.0+1.20.6) [Cubic Sun And Moon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cubic-sun-moon/version/1.8) [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin/version/1.12.3+kotlin.2.0.21) [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options/version/mc1.21.1-1.8.0-beta.4+fabric) [Spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark/version/1.10.109-fabric) [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers/version/1.6.7) [Ksyxis](https://modrinth.com/mod/ksyxis/version/1.3.2) [Even Better Enchants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/even-better-enchants/version/2-1.21) [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/version/11.0.3) [Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-shadowy-path-blocks/version/4.0.0-beta.2-fabric) [Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping/version/v1.0.5-mc1.21.1-fabric) [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations/version/1.7.6) [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core/version/7.0.1-fabric) [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.106.0+1.21.1) ( No kidding ) And a lot more ( I am wayy too lazy for all of them ) [Here you can see al the mods](https://modrinth.com/modpack/probablyaris-modpack/version/Classic)
